'''âdh-m-s''' ('''dhamasa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yel|yel]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-m-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yel|yel]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âdh-m-s
|-
! Lemma
| dhamasa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhamasithi|dhamasithi]] || [[word:dhamasiji|dhamasiji]] || [[word:dhamasishi|dhamasishi]] || [[word:dhamasi|dhamasi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhamasuthuth|dhamasuthuth]] || [[word:dhamasujuj|dhamasujuj]] || [[word:dhamasushush|dhamasushush]] || [[word:dhamas|dhamas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhamasuthu|dhamasuthu]] || [[word:dhamasuju|dhamasuju]] || [[word:dhamasushu|dhamasushu]] || [[word:dhamasu|dhamasu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhamasufuth|dhamasufuth]] || [[word:dhamasufuj|dhamasufuj]] || [[word:dhamasufush|dhamasufush]] || [[word:dhamasuf|dhamasuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhamasethe|dhamasethe]] || [[word:dhamaseje|dhamaseje]] || [[word:dhamaseshe|dhamaseshe]] || [[word:dhamase|dhamase]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhamasothoth|dhamasothoth]] || [[word:dhamasojoj|dhamasojoj]] || [[word:dhamasoshosh|dhamasoshosh]] || [[word:dhamas|dhamas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhamasotho|dhamasotho]] || [[word:dhamasojo|dhamasojo]] || [[word:dhamasosho|dhamasosho]] || [[word:dhamaso|dhamaso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhamasofoth|dhamasofoth]] || [[word:dhamasofoj|dhamasofoj]] || [[word:dhamasofosh|dhamasofosh]] || [[word:dhamasof|dhamasof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhamasĂŠthĂŠ|dhamasĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dhamasĂŠjĂŠ|dhamasĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dhamasĂŠshĂŠ|dhamasĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dhamasĂŠ|dhamasĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhamasathath|dhamasathath]] || [[word:dhamasajaj|dhamasajaj]] || [[word:dhamasashash|dhamasashash]] || [[word:dhamas|dhamas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhamasatha|dhamasatha]] || [[word:dhamasaja|dhamasaja]] || [[word:dhamasasha|dhamasasha]] || [[word:dhamasa|dhamasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhamasafath|dhamasafath]] || [[word:dhamasafaj|dhamasafaj]] || [[word:dhamasafash|dhamasafash]] || [[word:dhamasaf|dhamasaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:dhamasasha|dhamasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:godhamasasha|godhamasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokidhamasasha|gokidhamasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhamasnĂŒsha|dhamasnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:godhamasnknĂŒsha|godhamasnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokidhamasnĂŒsha|gokidhamasnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhamashĂ«sha|dhamashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhamasnkshĂ«sha|godhamasnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhamashĂ«sha|gokidhamashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhamasrosha|dhamasrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhamasnkrosha|godhamasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhamasrosha|gokidhamasrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhamasmusha|dhamasmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godhamasnkmusha|godhamasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhamasmusha|gokidhamasmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:dhamasherasha|dhamasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:godhamasnksherasha|godhamasnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokidhamasherasha|gokidhamasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:dhamasngasha|dhamasngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:godhamasnkngasha|godhamasnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokidhamasngasha|gokidhamasngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhamasyasha|dhamasyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:godhamasnkyasha|godhamasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokidhamasyasha|gokidhamasyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:dhamasyamasha|dhamasyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:godhamasnkyamasha|godhamasnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokidhamasyamasha|gokidhamasyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhamasnĂŒshĂ«sha|dhamasnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhamasnknĂŒshĂ«sha|godhamasnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhamasnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokidhamasnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhamasnĂŒrosha|dhamasnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhamasnknĂŒrosha|godhamasnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhamasnĂŒrosha|gokidhamasnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhamasnĂŒmusha|dhamasnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhamasnknĂŒmusha|godhamasnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhamasnĂŒmusha|gokidhamasnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhamashĂ«nĂŒsha|dhamashĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhamasnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|godhamasnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhamashĂ«nĂŒsha|gokidhamashĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhamashĂ«rosha|dhamashĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhamasnkshĂ«rosha|godhamasnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhamashĂ«rosha|gokidhamashĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhamashĂ«musha|dhamashĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhamasnkshĂ«musha|godhamasnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhamashĂ«musha|gokidhamashĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhamasronĂŒsha|dhamasronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhamasnkronĂŒsha|godhamasnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhamasronĂŒsha|gokidhamasronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhamasroshĂ«sha|dhamasroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhamasnkroshĂ«sha|godhamasnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhamasroshĂ«sha|gokidhamasroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhamasromusha|dhamasromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhamasnkromusha|godhamasnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhamasromusha|gokidhamasromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhamasmunĂŒsha|dhamasmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhamasnkmunĂŒsha|godhamasnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhamasmunĂŒsha|gokidhamasmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhamasmushĂ«sha|dhamasmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhamasnkmushĂ«sha|godhamasnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhamasmushĂ«sha|gokidhamasmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhamasmurosha|dhamasmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhamasnkmurosha|godhamasnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhamasmurosha|gokidhamasmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:dhamas|dhamas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:dhĂŠmĂŠs|dhĂŠmĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hodhamas|hodhamas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hodhĂŠmĂŠs|hodhĂŠmĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodhamas|hohodhamas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodhĂŠmĂŠs|hohodhĂŠmĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒdhamas|nĂŒdhamas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒdhĂŠmĂŠs|nĂŒdhĂŠmĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒdhamas|nĂŒnĂŒdhamas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒdhĂŠmĂŠs|nĂŒnĂŒdhĂŠmĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻdhamas|nĂŻdhamas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻdhĂŠmĂŠs|nĂŻdhĂŠmĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻdhamas|nĂŻnĂŻdhamas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻdhĂŠmĂŠs|nĂŻnĂŻdhĂŠmĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:ludhamas|ludhamas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ludhĂŠmĂŠs|ludhĂŠmĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludhamas|luludhamas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludhĂŠmĂŠs|luludhĂŠmĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lidhamas|lidhamas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lidhĂŠmĂŠs|lidhĂŠmĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidhamas|lilidhamas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidhĂŠmĂŠs|lilidhĂŠmĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kodhamas|kodhamas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kodhĂŠmĂŠs|kodhĂŠmĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodhamas|kokodhamas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodhĂŠmĂŠs|kokodhĂŠmĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kedhamas|kedhamas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kedhĂŠmĂŠs|kedhĂŠmĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedhamas|kekedhamas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedhĂŠmĂŠs|kekedhĂŠmĂŠs]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
